response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and executive leadership roles.
strengths: Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
Strong open-source contributions and personal projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and executive leadership
No clear experience in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
